name: State Street Spdr S&P/Asx 200 Listed Property Etf
analysis: SLF has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$13.1200. Trade idea: entry A$13.1100, stop A$12.2809, target A$15.5971 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
